'''Maber Yeff''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] member of the [[Peace Brigade]]. In [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]], he led the scout party that searched the [[Jedi Praxeum]] for [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] students during the [[Invasion of Yavin 4|Peace Brigade attack]] there.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest]]'' {{1st}}
